summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EnterprateAI new features: Scheduling API (optimal times, scheduled actions), Advanced Analytics API (dashboard, revenue trends, lead funnel, reports), Extended Growth Agent (new alert types), and frontend Growth page with Dashboard and Reports tabs. All 36 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed Dashboard tab displays overview cards, revenue trends, lead funnel; Reports tab generates business reports with insights; Growth Agent tab shows health score and alerts. Mobile responsiveness verified - all 6 tabs visible and properly arranged.
critical_code_review_comments: All new APIs are functional and returning expected data structures
Scheduling API correctly calculates optimal posting times for all platforms (linkedin, twitter, facebook, instagram)
Analytics Dashboard returns comprehensive overview, growth, social, and finance metrics
Revenue Trends API returns daily data with summary totals
Lead Funnel API returns all stages (NEW, CONTACTED, QUALIFIED, CONVERTED, LOST) with conversion rates
Business Report generation works for weekly, monthly, and quarterly types with insights and recommendations
Growth Agent analyze endpoint includes new alert types (low_engagement, growth_opportunity, instagram_opportunity)
Growth Agent recommend endpoint handles all new alert types correctly
Frontend Growth page has 6 responsive tabs that work on both desktop and mobile
Mobile responsiveness is good - tabs fit within viewport (342px width in 390px viewport)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from iteration 1. Created test scheduled actions via API tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Test files: /app/tests/test_new_features.py (36 tests for scheduling, analytics, growth agent), /app/tests/test_enterprate_api.py (25 tests from iteration 1). Frontend verified: Growth page Dashboard tab with overview cards, revenue trends, lead funnel; Reports tab with weekly/monthly/quarterly report generation; Growth Agent tab with health score and alerts. Mobile responsiveness confirmed.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/scheduling/optimal-times?platform=instagram&count=5 - Returns optimal posting times with engagement predictions
GET /api/scheduling/optimal-times for linkedin, twitter, facebook - All platforms work
POST /api/scheduling/actions - Creates scheduled action with id, scheduledFor, status=scheduled
GET /api/scheduling/actions - Returns list of scheduled actions
GET /api/scheduling/actions?status=scheduled - Filter by status works
GET /api/scheduling/actions?platform=instagram - Filter by platform works
GET /api/analytics/dashboard - Returns overview, growth, social, finance metrics
Overview contains: totalRevenue, totalExpenses, netProfit, profitMargin
Growth contains: totalLeads, convertedLeads, conversionRate, activeCampaigns
Social contains: totalPosts, publishedPosts, scheduledPosts, platformBreakdown
Finance contains: totalInvoices, paidInvoices, pendingInvoices, overdueInvoices
GET /api/analytics/revenue-trends?days=30 - Returns trends and summary
Summary contains: totalRevenue, totalExpenses, totalProfit, avgDailyRevenue
Supports different periods: 7, 30, 90 days
GET /api/analytics/lead-funnel - Returns funnel data with conversion rates
Contains all stages: NEW, CONTACTED, QUALIFIED, CONVERTED, LOST
Returns funnelRates, stageConversion, overallConversionRate
GET /api/analytics/report?report_type=monthly - Generates comprehensive report
Report contains: executiveSummary, sections, insights, recommendations
Supports report types: weekly, monthly, quarterly
GET /api/growth/agent/analyze - Returns alerts with new types
POST /api/growth/agent/recommend with alertType=low_engagement - Works
POST /api/growth/agent/recommend with alertType=growth_opportunity - Works
POST /api/growth/agent/recommend with alertType=instagram_campaign - Works
GET /api/company-profile/fees - Returns exactly 13 fee entries

features_verified: Overview cards: Revenue, Profit, Total Leads, Campaigns
Revenue Trends (30 Days) section with Total Revenue, Total Expenses, Net Profit
Lead Funnel with all stages and conversion percentages
Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly report generation buttons
Key Insights section with warnings and recommendations
All 6 tabs visible on mobile (390x844 viewport)
Tabs container width 342px fits within viewport
Stats cards stack vertically on mobile
Growth Agent section visible with health score
Tabs arranged in 2-row grid for mobile accessibility
